PlayerProfile.title: Player Profile
PlayerProfile.description: The profile data of an arena player.

username.description: The display username of the player

league.description: Current league (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond, Master, Legend)

lastClaimedRewardDate.description: ISO timestamp of the last claimed daily reward

Hero.title: Hero Configuration
Hero.description: The upgrade stats and skins for a specific hero owned by a user.

heroId.description: Unique identifier for the hero archetype

unlocked.description: Whether the player unlocked the hero

QueueEntry.title: Matchmaking Queue Entry
QueueEntry.description: Represents a player currently waiting in the matchmaking queue.

MatchState.title: Match State
MatchState.description: State tracking for an active turned-based 1v1 battle.

currentTurn.description: UID of the player whose turn it is

turnDeadline.description: Unix milliseconds for timeout of turn

players/{playerId}.description: Player files containing profiles and statistics

players/{playerId}/heroes/{heroId}.description: Individual hero rosters for each player containing levels and unlocked skins

matchmaking/queue/entries/{userId}.description: Active queue entries for online matching

matches/{matchId}.description: Active battle simulations and real-time state synchronization rooms
